headline: Is Veralto (VLTO) Below Fair Value After Its Water Deal?
summary: Veralto stock has slipped over the past year, yet its valuation picture is split, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to a sizeable discount while market multiples suggest the shares are priced at a premium. That tension between a DCF that screens the stock as undervalued and richer market ratios is now front and center for investors trying to assess what the current price really implies. Over the last 12 months, Veralto shares are down 11.6%, which may make...

headline: Analysts Estimate GFL Environmental Inc. (GFL) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: GFL Environmental (GFL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Veralto (VLTO) Buys Alfaa UV To Grow Its Water Treatment Reach In India
summary: Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) has acquired Indian ultraviolet water treatment company Alfaa UV. Alfaa UV will be integrated into Veralto’s Trojan Technologies unit to expand its UV water treatment portfolio. The deal adds a broader commercial presence for Veralto in India and the wider Asia-Pacific region. Veralto, trading at $90.18, is using this acquisition to add scale and geographic reach to its water treatment operations. The stock has been under pressure over the past year, with shares down...
